lines.speaker: Guildmaster Lars
lines.text: Welcome to the woodcutting guild. How may I help you?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Lars
lines.text: I founded the woodcutting guild when I retired from the Shayzien military. I spotted the ancient redwood trees in the hills many years ago from the Shayzien camp, and decided to construct the guild around them.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Lars
lines.text: You can find them to the West, just follow the path.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Lars
lines.text: However, if you're skilled in combat, or simply afraid of heights, the ent cavern may be more suited for you. The ents dwell deep beneath the ancient redwoods, and can be accessed through the cave to the North-West.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Lars
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Lars
lines.text: My name is Lars, and I am the founder of the woodcutting guild. I originally grew up in a Shayzien camp, and was raised on the battlefield.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Lars
lines.text: As I grew older, I found peace in Hosidius, and the joys of skilled labour. I turned in my battleaxe for a hatchet, and set up a guild for those also talented in the skill of woodcutting.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Lars
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Lars
lines.text: Sure, let me know if there's anything I can do for you.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Lars
lines.text: Please make yourself some space, I have something for you.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Lars
lines.text: That doesn't look solved to me.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Lars
lines.text: Well done [player name]. Here you go.
